title: Saving All My Love for You
why_this_song: Saving All My Love for You by Whitney Houston (1985) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "saving" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "saving" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "feeling" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "feeling" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But no other man's gonna do
But that's just an old fantasy
No other woman is gonna love you more

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Saving All My Love for You" was released in 1985. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Saving All My Love for You" foi lançada em 1985. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Saving All My Love for You" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Saving All My Love for You" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Saving All My Love for You" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Saving All My Love for You" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?
